compressed_prompt: compose a lowercase letter to a friend, urging them to vote, no commas or informal tone.
response:
hey friend

i know voting feels like a hassle but it really does matter. every single vote adds up and makes a difference especially in local elections where things can swing on just a few hundred votes. you might think your voice doesn’t count but that’s exactly what people in power want you to think.

if you don’t vote someone else will decide for you. and chances are they won’t care about the things you do. so take 20 minutes out of your day to show up and make sure your voice is heard. it’s the least we can do for ourselves and for each other.

i’m voting because i want to live in a world where people like us have a say. don’t let anyone tell you it’s not worth it. it is.

let me know if you need a ride or anything. just don’t skip it okay?
